title: Add Recharts data visualization to a Next.js project
summary: Complete Recharts integration for Next.js App Router — responsive containers, line/bar/area/pie charts, custom tooltips, dynamic data, and SSR-safe rendering.
declaration: I will integrate Recharts into this Next.js project to add responsive, interactive data visualizations. Recharts is React-native (no canvas) and works with SSR guards. If you need D3 or Chart.js instead, say so before I begin.
